amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 180,135 in Home & Kitchen (See Top 100 in Home & Kitchen) 634 in Reusable Shopping Bags

features: These attractive designs have been printed onto a 100% eco friendly natural jute bag with a 18cm gusset and webbing wrapped handles for comfort.
These are ideal bags for everyday use with plenty of room for shopping.
The inside of the jute bag is laminated, which both adds structure and protects shopping, clothes and food from looses fibres.
Measures 17" / 43cm wide x 13.75"/35cm high (excluding handles) x 7"/18cm deep.
